name: OpenClaw (Secure)
description: Self-hosted personal AI assistant via WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Discord and more. Hardened deployment: loopback-only gateway, required token auth, DM pairing, sandbox for group sessions, non-root container. Setup wizard for easy provider & model selection.

variables.name: GATEWAY_TOKEN
variables.description: Auth token for the gateway. Auto-generated — do not change unless you know what you're doing.

variables.name: SETUP_PASSWORD
variables.description: Password for the /setup wizard. Auto-generated — save this from your Railway Variables tab.

variables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
variables.description: Optional — you can also set this via the /setup wizard after deploy.

variables.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
variables.description: Optional — you can also set this via the /setup wizard after deploy.

variables.name: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN
variables.description: Telegram bot token from @BotFather. Optional — enables Telegram channel.

variables.name: DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN
variables.description: Discord bot token. Optional — enables Discord channel.

variables.name: TAILSCALE_AUTH_KEY
variables.description: Tailscale auth key for private networking. Recommended — takes OpenClaw off the public internet. Generate at: tailscale.com/admin/settings/keys
